rationale: Tests whether consecutive high-volume negative closes followed by low-volume rallies flag terminal trend decay.
expected_failure_mode: High-volume selling can represent brief index rebalancing rather than persistent institutional distribution.
stop_conditions: simple family fails the named-window or parsimony gates
near-Gold candidate repeats known Gold contract failures
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
False positive exit rate exceeds 60% in secular bull markets.
Profit factor drops below 1.25 on a rolling 3-year basis.
